sections.instruction: Questions 1 and 2: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 3-6: Complete the table below using NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS. Questions 7 and 8: Circle TWO letters. Questions 9 and 10: Circle TWO letters.

questions.content: What does the applicant work on for a living?
What kind of pet does the applicant have?
Which TWO of the following are included at the apartment in Harbour Square?
What TWO things does the client request before moving in?

sections.instruction: Questions 11 and 12: Choose the correct letter. Questions 13-15: Circle THREE letters from A-F. Question 16: Choose the correct letter. Questions 17 and 18: Circle TWO letters A-E. Questions 19 and 20: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Why does Elizabeth encourage students to join the athletic programme?
options: A it helps he stay in shape
B it has taught her about teamwork and friendship
C it has been a fun but painful experience

questions.content: How does Elizabeth have time for both gymnastics and academics?

options: A take classes that she is interested in
C study for all her classes at once
D study for each class one at a time
E she studies away from distractions
F she studies with the television on

questions.content: Who helped to start Elizabeth’s participation in gymnastics?
Why does Elizabeth say that her first year of university was the best experience of her life?
options: A she met her best friends
B she made the gymnastics team
D she learned to be independent

questions.content: What was the effect of Elizabeth breaking her wrist?
options: A she was unable to do her homework
B she was unable to participate in sports
C she was unable to write at all

questions.content: Why does Elizabeth say that breaking her wrist made her stronger as a person?
options: A she learned to value the people close to her
B she learned to value the use of her hand
C she learned to value her participation in sports

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 26 and 27: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 28-30: Circle the three correct letters.

questions.content: Which THREE advantages of satellite transmitters does Mike mention?
options: B not bother people living nearby
E keep you off dangerous roads

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.
